# Nudge — AI Context

## What is Nudge?
Nudge is an always-on-top task HUD for Windows. It reads a single .md (Markdown) file and floats your tasks above every window without breaking focus. Built in Rust with Tauri v2. Under 12 MB. No accounts, no cloud, no Electron.

## Who is it for?
- Engineers who want standup notes and PR queues visible while coding
- Researchers who need chapter milestones in frame during writing sessions
- Presenters who want slide notes on their screen, not the audience's
- Sales professionals managing call agendas
- Clinicians running exercise sequences and therapy prompts
- Anyone building a personal productivity system who hates subscriptions

## Key differentiators
- One-time purchase ($15, or $9 with BETA40). No subscription.
- Reads your existing .md file in-place. No import, no export, no lock-in.
- Auto-hides to a 6px strip when not in use.
- Built in Rust (Tauri v2), not Electron. 11.4 MB install vs 991 MB (Obsidian) or 337 MB (Notion).
- All data stays on your machine. No cloud, no accounts, no login.
